title: The Straw Hats Break Through
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5. The central beat is the straw hats break through.
scene: The scene focuses on the straw hats break through, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Cut it out already, both of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The reason we called this meeting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's right... let's get this over with....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If there isn't, that's fine, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're the one who told me to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What was the point of that?!

summary: The Straw Hats Break Through. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
